consistency.mechanics: Consistent. The spell provides layered protection (anti-teleport/planar travel) and area denial damage, both clearly defined.
consistency.formatting: Follows standard spell block format for description.

quality.clarity: High. The spell's effects are detailed and unambiguous, covering entry restrictions and damage triggers.
quality.completeness: High. Includes level, school, casting time, components (with high-value material cost), duration, trigger conditions, and class availability.
quality.flavor: Appropriate for a high-level Abjuration spell, focusing on sanctifying or locking down an area against extraplanar or unwanted presences.

mechanics.level_and_school: Level 6 Abjuration is suitable for such a potent, long-duration area denial/protection spell.
mechanics.ritual_tag: Appropriate for a 10-minute casting time and 1-day duration, suggesting preparatory magic.
mechanics.component_cost: The 1,000 gp material component (consumed or not, the text implies consumption upon the 30th day casting) is fitting for a powerful ward.
mechanics.area_of_effect: A large area (40,000 sq ft) defined by floor space and height, typical for fixed wards.
mechanics.anti_travel_effect: Comprehensive, blocking teleportation, portals, and entry via several major planes (Astral, Ethereal, Fey, Shadow) and _Plane Shift_.
mechanics.damage_trigger: First entry into the area per turn OR starting the turn there. This is a strong trigger, ensuring creatures inside suffer damage if they remain.
mechanics.damage_output: 5d10 damage (Radiant or Necrotic). This is substantial for a sustained area effect at level 6.
mechanics.damage_types: Choice of Radiant/Necrotic allows flexibility, often aligning with the caster's deity or purpose (e.g., Radiant against Fiends/Undead, Necrotic against Celstials/Fey).
mechanics.exceptions: The password clause is a standard and necessary quality-of-life feature for a protective ward that might need to be entered by allies.
mechanics.duration_extension: The 30-day continuous casting to make the spell permanent (until dispelled) is a classic, high-commitment feature for masterwork defensive magic.

analysis.zod_errors_assessment: No errors detected. The data appears clean and complete based on standard TTRPG data schemas.
